title: End-preparation of amplicon pools
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"qnlk","text":"This is a subprotocol for generating a library from a single amplicon pool","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"dt4lr","text":"See SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for safety warnings and hazards.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set up the following reaction for each sample: Component Volume DNA amplicons (5ng/ul) 10 µL Nuclease-free water 2.5 µL Ultra II End Prep Reaction Buffer 1.75 µL Ultra II End Prep Enzyme Mix 0.75 µL Total 15 µL
Incubate at room temperature for 00:05:00 Incubate at 65 °C f for 00:05:00 Incubate on ice for 00:01:00
creator: Josh Quick
